design_system.name: JewelVault OS
design_system.description: A clinical luxury design system for high-precision inventory management. Merges the aesthetics of a Swiss bank vault with the elegance of a Cartier showroom.

theme_strategy.philosophy: Data is the jewel. The UI is the velvet display case. High contrast for readability, rich accents for value.

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. It adds the 'luxury' touch. Keep weights heavy (700+).
usage_rules.body: Use Manrope for all UI text. It is geometric but friendly.
usage_rules.data: CRITICAL: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL weights, prices, and inventory counts. Tabular figures are mandatory for alignment.

containers.dashboard_card: bg-card border border-border/40 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6
containers.data_table: w-full caption-bottom text-sm border rounded-md overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-md rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-md px-6 py-2 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-md px-6 py-2

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-muted-foreground/25 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors rounded-xl p-12 text-center cursor-pointer bg-muted/5

cards.stat_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm p-6 flex flex-col justify-between hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/70 border border-white/20 shadow-lg
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients for backgrounds. Avoid linear gradients on buttons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals. Keep shadows diffuse and soft.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-precision tool. Accuracy is paramount. Do not hide data behind clicks unless necessary.
instructions_to_main_agent.tables: Tables are the heart of this app. Use 'TanStack Table' (React Table) logic. Ensure columns are resizable and sortable. Use sticky headers.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Use 'react-hook-form' with 'zod' validation. Inventory inputs must validate numbers strictly.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use 'Recharts'. Style them minimally. No 3D charts. Use the Emerald and Gold palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_structure: Sidebar Layout. Left: Navigation. Top: Global Search & User Profile. Center: Main Content.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_handling: The upload process is critical. Create a dedicated 'Upload Wizard' step-by-step flow: 1. Select Type (Purchase/Sale/Physical) -> 2. Drop File -> 3. Preview/Validate -> 4. Confirm.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects for sticky headers.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
